layerzone.17: belowgrid "0 if hasattr(me, 'EncloseOPs') and me.EncloseOPs else 1"

Bodytext.67108945: "perhaps the most important part here, the Histogram POP takes an attribute and puts all points values into a number of bins. The output is a single point with the number of points in that bin." "'perhaps the most important part here, the Histogram POP takes an attribute and puts all points values into a number of bins. The output is a single point with the number of points in that bin.\\nThe number of bins possible depends on the pixel format. 8bit has 256 bins while 16 bit already would use a theoretical 65536 bins. Here we just clamp it to the render width if the theoretical required bins are larger than the resolution.'"
